verses.latin_vulgate: Notus in Judæa Deus ;  in Israël magnum nomen ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נוֹדָ֣ע בִּיהוּדָ֣ה אֱלֹהִ֑ים בְּ֝יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל גָּד֥וֹל שְׁמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: In Judah is God known: his name is great in Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est in pace locus ejus,  et habitatio ejus in Sion.
verses.king_james: In Salem also is his tabernacle, and his dwelling place in Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibi confregit potentias arcuum,  scutum, gladium, et bellum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֭מָּה שִׁבַּ֣ר רִשְׁפֵי־קָ֑שֶׁת מָגֵ֬ן וְחֶ֖רֶב וּמִלְחָמָ֣ה סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: There brake he the arrows of the bow, the shield, and the sword, and the battle. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Illuminans tu mirabiliter a montibus æternis ;
verses.king_james: Thou art more glorious and excellent than the mountains of prey.

verses.latin_vulgate: turbati sunt omnes insipientes corde.  Dormierunt somnum suum,  et nihil invenerunt omnes viri divitiarum in manibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶשְׁתּֽוֹלְל֨וּ ׀ אַבִּ֣ירֵי לֵ֭ב נָמ֣וּ שְׁנָתָ֑ם וְלֹֽא־מָצְא֖וּ כׇל־אַנְשֵׁי־חַ֣יִל יְדֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: The stouthearted are spoiled, they have slept their sleep: and none of the men of might have found their hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ab increpatione tua, Deus Jacob,  dormitaverunt qui ascenderunt equos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֭גַּעֲרָ֣תְךָ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יַעֲקֹ֑ב נִ֝רְדָּ֗ם וְרֶ֣כֶב וָסֽוּס׃
verses.king_james: At thy rebuke, O God of Jacob, both the chariot and horse are cast into a dead sleep.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu terribilis es ; et quis resistet tibi ?  ex tunc ira tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֤ה ׀ נ֥וֹרָא אַ֗תָּה וּמִֽי־יַעֲמֹ֥ד לְפָנֶ֗יךָ מֵאָ֥ז אַפֶּֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Thou, even thou, art to be feared: and who may stand in thy sight when once thou art angry?

verses.latin_vulgate: De cælo auditum fecisti judicium :  terra tremuit et quievit
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֭שָּׁמַיִם הִשְׁמַ֣עְתָּ דִּ֑ין אֶ֖רֶץ יָֽרְאָ֣ה וְשָׁקָֽטָה׃
verses.king_james: Thou didst cause judgment to be heard from heaven; the earth feared, and was still,

verses.latin_vulgate: cum exsurgeret in judicium Deus,  ut salvos faceret omnes mansuetos terræ.
verses.king_james: When God arose to judgment, to save all the meek of the earth. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam cogitatio hominis confitebitur tibi,  et reliquiæ cogitationis diem festum agent tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־חֲמַ֣ת אָדָ֣ם תּוֹדֶ֑ךָּ שְׁאֵרִ֖ית חֵמֹ֣ת תַּחְגֹּֽר׃
verses.king_james: Surely the wrath of man shall praise thee: the remainder of wrath shalt thou restrain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vovete et reddite Domino Deo vestro,  omnes qui in circuitu ejus affertis munera :  terribili,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִ֥דְר֣וּ וְשַׁלְּמוּ֮ לַיהֹוָ֢ה אֱֽלֹהֵ֫יכֶ֥ם כׇּל־סְבִיבָ֑יו יֹבִ֥ילוּ שַׁ֝֗י לַמּוֹרָֽא׃
verses.king_james: Vow, and pay unto the Lord your God: let all that be round about him bring presents unto him that ought to be feared.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ei qui aufert spiritum principum :  terribili apud reges terræ.
verses.king_james: He shall cut off the spirit of princes: he is terrible to the kings of the earth.
